data.title: State-level crypto investment on the agenda in the US: Arizona House Rules Committee passes two crypto bills.
data.description: The Arizona House Rules Committee has passed two crypto-related bills, which are about to quickly move to a full House vote. SB1042 allows the state government to invest up to 10% of its funds in crypto assets; SB1649 proposes establishing a state-level digital asset reserve fund to provide institutional support for crypto investment and management. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: China Extradites Key Member of Criminal Group from Cambodia
data.description: China's Ministry of Public Security has announced the extradition of Li Xiong, a significant figure within the Chen Zhi criminal organization, from Phnom Penh, Cambodia. According to NS3.AI, Li Xiong previously held the position of chairman at Huione Group, a subsidiary of Prince Group. He is under investigation for alleged involvement in casino operations, fraud, illegal business activities, and concealing criminal proceeds.

data.title: Call for Clearer U.S. Rules to Boost Tokenization in Small Enterprises
data.description: Plume Network General Counsel Salman Banaei emphasized the need for clearer U.S. regulations to facilitate the adoption of tokenization among small enterprises and community-focused asset-backed securities. According to NS3.AI, such regulatory clarity could significantly enhance the integration of tokenized assets in these sectors. Anne-Sophie Cissey, Chief Administrative Officer at Kaiko, advocated for the establishment of shared standards and improved market structures to support this transition. Recently, the FDIC, Federal Reserve Board, and OCC issued joint guidance on the capital treatment of eligible tokenized securities, highlighting the growing focus on regulatory frameworks in this area.

data.title: Arizona Advances Two Cryptocurrency Bills to House Vote
data.description: Arizona is moving forward with two cryptocurrency-related bills, as they have successfully passed the House Rules Committee and are set for a full House vote. According to ChainCatcher, the first bill, SB1042, proposes allowing state funds to invest up to 10% in cryptocurrencies. The second bill, SB1649, aims to establish a digital asset reserve fund. These legislative developments reflect Arizona's growing interest in integrating digital currencies into its financial framework.

data.title: Global Food Production Concerns Rise Amid U.S. Planting Shortfall
data.description: According to Jin10, Chicago grain prices have surged as U.S. planting areas fall short of expectations, exacerbating concerns over food production amid the ongoing Middle East conflict. The U.S. Department of Agriculture reported that soybean planting areas recorded 84.7 million acres, disappointing traders and leading to further price increases. Wheat planting areas also fell short of analyst expectations at 43.8 million acres. Arlan Suderman, Chief Commodities Economist at StoneX, noted in a report that the total planting area for wheat, corn, and soybeans is approximately one million acres less than anticipated. He added that the reduction in wheat planting aligns with global trends. This disappointing report may heighten risks to global food production, as the month-long U.S.-Israel conflict with Iran has driven up energy and fertilizer prices, threatening global food production. Rising costs not only squeeze farmers' profits but also drive up food inflation, ultimately harming the global economy.

data.title: PeckShield: Crypto hacker losses surged 96% month-over-month to $52 million in March.
data.description: A report released by blockchain security firm PeckShield states that 20 major security incidents occurred in the crypto industry in March 2026, resulting in a total loss of $52 million, a 96% increase compared to $26.5 million in February. However, the report points out that a greater risk lies in "shadow contagion," a chain reaction of systemic risks triggered by attacks. Specifically: 1. Resolv Labs' stablecoin USR experienced a de-pegging incident, with 80 million USR being "unlimitedly issued," causing approximately $25 million in losses and further triggering systemic bad debts in protocols such as Morpho Blue, Euler, and Fluid. 2. Venus suffered a complex attack combining on-chain and off-chain elements, resulting in approximately $2.18 million in bad debt losses. The report also points out that security threats are expanding from on-chain to real-world and social engineering levels. For example, user Sillytuna suffered a combined offline and on-chain attack, resulting in a loss of $24 million; another Kraken big player lost $18 million due to a targeted social engineering attack.

data.title: MGBX will be listed on edgeX (EDGE) spot trading.
data.description: According to official news, MGBX will list edgeX (EDGE) spot trading on April 1, 2026 at 18:00 (SGT). Deposits will open at 16:00 (SGT) on April 1, 2026. Trading will open at 18:00 (SGT) on April 1, 2026. Withdrawals will open at 19:00 (SGT) on April 3, 2026.

data.title: MSCI Upgrades Greek Stock Market to Developed Status
data.description: MSCI Inc. has elevated the Greek stock market to developed market status, marking a significant milestone in the country's recovery from a decade-long debt crisis. According to Ming Pao, this upgrade reflects Greece's progress in stabilizing its economy and financial markets after years of economic challenges.

data.title: Crypto Hack Losses Surge to $52 Million in March
data.description: According to NS3.AI, PeckShield reported that losses from cryptocurrency hacks reached $52 million in March, marking a 96% increase compared to February. The most significant incident involved a $25 million loss related to the ResolvLabs USR depegging event.

data.title: Caltech Researchers Propose Efficient Quantum Computer Design
data.description: Caltech researchers have proposed a new design for a functional quantum computer that could significantly reduce the number of qubits required. According to NS3.AI, the researchers suggest that a quantum computer could be built with 10,000 to 20,000 qubits, rather than the millions previously thought necessary. The proposed neutral-atom error-correction architecture could encode each logical qubit using as few as five physical qubits, potentially making quantum computing more feasible and efficient.

data.title: Indonesia's March CPI Rises 3.48%, Below Expectations
data.description: Indonesia's Consumer Price Index (CPI) for March increased by 3.48% year-on-year, according to Jin10. This figure falls short of the 3.60% rise anticipated by a Reuters survey. The CPI data is a key indicator of inflation and economic health, influencing monetary policy decisions in the country.

data.title: Brother Machi closed all his Bitcoin long positions one hour ago, and currently holds 6,800 ETH in his Ethereum long positions.
data.description: According to Hyperbot data, Huang Licheng's Bitcoin long positions were all closed one hour ago, and his HYPE long positions were also all closed this morning. He currently holds a 25x leveraged Ethereum long position of 6,800 ETH, with a position value of $14.337 million, a floating profit of $306,000, and a liquidation price of $2,039.

data.title: Ministry of Public Security: Li Xiong, a core member of Chen Zhi's criminal gang, has been extradited from Cambodia back to China.
data.description: A working group dispatched by the Ministry of Public Security successfully extradited Li Xiong, a core member of Chen Zhi's criminal gang, from Phnom Penh, Cambodia, back to China. This marks another significant achievement in law enforcement cooperation between China and Cambodia. Investigations revealed that Li Xiong was formerly the chairman of Huiwang Group, a subsidiary of the Prince Group, and is suspected of multiple crimes, including operating casinos, fraud, illegal business operations, and concealing criminal proceeds. Currently, Li Xiong has been placed under coercive measures in accordance with the law, and the relevant cases are under further investigation. A relevant official from the Ministry of Public Security stated that several key members of Chen Zhi's criminal gang have been apprehended, and the public security organs will continue to intensify their efforts to resolutely bring fugitives to justice. (Beijing News)

data.title: Hyperbot Data Reveals Huang Licheng's Bitcoin and HYPE Positions Closed
data.description: Hyperbot data indicates that Huang Licheng, also known as Machi Big Brother, has closed all his Bitcoin long positions. According to ChainCatcher, his HYPE long positions were also closed this morning. Currently, he holds a 25x leveraged Ethereum long position with 6,800 ETH, valued at $14.337 million, with an unrealized profit of $306,000 and a liquidation price of $2,039.

data.title: Tech Stocks Rebound as Meta and Nvidia Lead Gains
data.description: Meta and Nvidia spearheaded a recovery in the U.S. tech sector's 'Magnificent Seven,' achieving gains of 6.67% and 5.59%, respectively. According to NS3.AI, other major tech companies, including Google, Tesla, Amazon, Microsoft, and Apple, also experienced increases, with their stock prices rising between 2.9% and 5.14%.

data.title: MakerDAO Co-Founder Adjusts Oil and Stock Positions Amid Market Shifts
data.description:
On April 1, recent monitoring by Hyperinsight revealed that MakerDAO co-founder Rune has partially reduced long positions in WTIOIL (WTI crude oil). According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, the balance between oil and U.S. stock index positions is becoming more stable.

Currently, the address holds approximately $8.5 million in long oil positions, including WTI and Brent crude oil, and around $6.3 million in short U.S. stock index positions, covering the Nasdaq 100 and S&P 500, with a total holding exceeding $14.8 million. As of the time of reporting, the whale has not further reduced its positions today.

Over the past week, geopolitical conflicts have intensified, resulting in a profit of over $1.4 million for the portfolio. However, today's signals of a ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran have boosted market sentiment, leading to a decline in oil prices and a rise in U.S. stock indices. This has temporarily pressured the stagflation trading logic, causing the address to give back approximately $600,000 in profits.

data.title: BitMart contracts will list AMGNONUSDT, COFONUSDT, and ADIONUSDT.
data.description: According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch perpetual contracts for AMGNONUSDT, COFONUSDT, and ADIONUSDT on April 1, 2026 at 16:00 (UTC+8), supporting leverage up to 20x.

data.title: US tech giants rebounded across the board, with Meta and Nvidia leading the gains, each rising over 5%.
data.description: Boosted by a significant easing of geopolitical risks between the US and Iran, all stocks related to the "Magnificent 7" of US tech giants rebounded today. According to Bitget market data, Meta and Nvidia led the gains, rising 6.67% and 5.59% respectively, while Google, Tesla, Amazon, Microsoft, and Apple all rose between 2.9% and 5.14%. On a macro level, the easing of geopolitical tensions has effectively reduced global risk premiums, prompting funds to flow back into high-beta growth assets. It is understood that Bitget's UEX exchange now supports trading in the aforementioned "Magnificent 7" US stock tokens and contracts, aiming to provide users with a one-stop cross-asset allocation and risk hedging tool.

data.title: SIREN Market Maker Executes Buyback Strategy with 500,000 SIREN Tokens
data.description: A SIREN market maker address recently executed a buyback of 500,000 SIREN tokens, spending 144,000 USDT at a price of $0.288 per token. According to NS3.AI, this transaction occurred half an hour ago. Previously, the same address had sold the same amount of SIREN tokens in the first half of the previous month at a price of $0.947, generating 473,000 USDT from the sale.

data.title: Jamie Dimon Advocates for Stronger Stance Against Iran
data.description: Morgan Stanley Chairman and CEO Jamie Dimon has made striking hawkish remarks, openly defending military action and criticizing Iran's actions over the past 45 years. According to Odaily, Dimon questioned why the Western world has tolerated Iran's behavior for so long, emphasizing that eliminating the Iranian threat is far more significant than short-term market performance. Dimon stated, "Allowing those individuals to control the Strait of Hormuz and fund all these proxy wars, why has the Western world endured these proxy wars for 45 years? I find it somewhat difficult to understand, and I truly hope for a positive outcome, hoping we can somehow achieve lasting peace in the Middle East."
